content.scenarioHint: 你和朋友在咖啡馆偶遇，想自然地打招呼并邀请他参加你本周六晚上的小型聚会
content.speakerText: Hey, long time no see! How's it going? I'm actually hosting a little get-together this Saturday night — thought you might want to join?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，好久不见！最近怎么样？我这周六晚上办个小聚会，想着你可能想来参加？
expectedAnswers: That sounds awesome! I'm free — what time?
Oh nice! Count me in. Should I bring anything?
Hmm, I'm not sure yet, but I'll let you know by Thursday!
Love that idea! I've been wanting to hang out. Where's it at?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达了邀请意图并自然承接了打招呼
语言准确性：语法正确，时态和用词恰当
表达自然度：语气轻松友好，符合朋友间日常对话习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'get-together', 'Saturday night', 'join' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Hey, I'm having a little get-together next Friday — you in?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，我下周五有个小型聚会，你来吗？
expectedAnswers: Definitely! I love these kinds of things!
Hmm, maybe — I’ll text you tomorrow to confirm.
Sounds fun! I’m free after 7 PM.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回应邀请（接受/犹豫/有条件接受）
语言准确性：使用恰当的口语表达（e.g., you in?, get-together）
表达自然度：语气符合朋友间随意但真诚的互动风格
